duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(3,7): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C'.

duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(4,3): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(4,4): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(4,6): error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(5,3): error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(5,12): error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(5,12): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'y'.

duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua(5,15): error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.


==== duplicatePropertyAndAccessor.tlua (14 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/4130
    
    class C {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      y: number = 2;
      ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
      ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
       ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
         ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
      accessor y: number = 3;
      ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
               ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
               ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'y'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                  ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
    }
